recent_news.title: Why the Next India-Pakistan War Will Escalate
recent_news.summary: America will struggle to contain it.
recent_news.body_text:
ELIZABETH THRELKELD is a Senior Fellow and Director of the South Asia Program at the Stimson Center.
And Why America Will Struggle to Contain It
Elizabeth Threlkeld
In his 2026 State of the Union address, U.S. President Donald Trump repeated a familiar refrain celebrating his role in ending the May 2025 conflict between India and Pakistan—the deal he has said he is most proud of. He declared that

general_news.title: How Regions Shaped World Population Growth since 1960
general_news.source: St. Louis Fed On the Economy
general_news.summary: While the global population more than doubled from 1960 to 2020, the growth was unevenly distributed. Two regions accounted for most of that population change.
